query: SELECT pv.id, p.name as product_name, pv.sku, pv.supplierProductCode, pv.stockQuantity, pv.inTransitQuantity FROM product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id WHERE pv.stockQuantity > 0 OR pv.inTransitQuantity > 0 ORDER BY p.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT pv.id, p.name as product_name, pv.sku, pv.supplierProductCode, pv.stockQuantity, pv.inTransitQuantity FROM product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id WHERE pv.stockQuantity > 0 OR pv.inTransitQuantity > 0 ORDER BY p.name;
